Usetha kabusha ukufihla kwale akhawunti?

Imilayezo endala efihliwe ingase ingafundeki ngaphandle kokuthi ubuyisele ukhiye wokuqala kamuva.

encryptionRecovery.resetDescription: Lokhu kukhiqiza ukhiye omusha wokufihla imilayezo ku-akhawunti yakho. Imilayezo endala efihliwe ingase ingasafundeki ngaphandle kokuthi ubuyisele ukhiye wokuqala kamuva.

encryptionRecovery.simpleDescription: Sebenzisa ikhodi yakho yedivayisi noma ubuyisele i-backup ukuze uvule imilayezo efihliwe.
encryptionRecovery.restoreDescription: Buyisela ukhiye wakho wengxoxo efihliwe kusuka ku-backup evikelwe ngephasiwedi yakho ye-backup.

smsConsent.label: Ngivuma ukuthola izaziso ze-SMS nezokuxwayisa ezivela ku-{{companyName}}. Ukuvama kwemilayezo kungahluka. Izindleko zemilayezo nedatha zingase zisebenze. Phendula <stop>STOP</stop> ukuze ukhansele noma kunini. Phendula <help>HELP</help> ukuze uthole usizo.

auth.headline: Ukuthumela imilayezo okuphephile kunoma ubani, noma kuphi
auth.description: Ukubethela kusukela ekuqaleni kuya ekugcineni, ukuhumusha ezilimini ezingaphezu kuka-100, imilayezo ephunyayo, kanye nokubiza ngomsindo/ividiyo.

feature.encryption: Ukubethela kusukela ekuqaleni kuya ekugcineni ngokungagcini
feature.imfihlo: Imfihlo kuqala. Idatha yakho, ukulawula kwakho.

hero.line1: Ukuthumela imilayezo ephephile kunoma ubani, noma kuphi — nge
hero.sub: Thola inombolo yocingo evikelekile yamahhala ongayisebenzisa ukushayela nokuthumela imiyalezo emhlabeni wonke nge-Wi-Fi noma ngedatha. Jabulela ukuvikelwa kwedatha kusukela ekuqaleni kuya ekugcineni, imiyalezo ephambayo, nokushayela kwezwi/ividiyo kwe-HD — ngezinsiza ezakhelwe ngaphakathi ezikusiza ukuthi uhlale uxhumekile ngaphesheya kwemingcele.
hero.freeNote: Ukushayela nokuthumela imiyalezo okuyisisekelo kumahhala. I-AI ethuthukile nezici eziphakeme zidinga ukuba uyezibuyekeze.

feat.encryption: Ukuvikelwa kwedatha kusukela ekuqaleni kuya ekugcineni, kuhlala kusebenza
feat.privacy: Ubumfihlo kuqala. Idatha yakho, ukulawula kwakho.

resetPassword.strongPasswordHint: Khetha iphasiwedi eqinile ongayisebenzisi kwenye indawo.

profile.title: Iphrofayela yomsebenzisi
profile.noPrivateKey: Ayikho ukhiye wangasese kulesi sixhobo ongawuthumela ngaphandle.
profile.setBackupPassword: Beka iphasiwedi ukuze uvikele ukugcinwa kwakho:
profile.importFailed: Kwehlulekile ukungenisa ukhiye (iphasiwedi engalungile noma ifayela elonakele).
profile.keysRotated: Kudalwe ipheya elisha lezihluthulelo futhi isihluthulelo somphakathi silayishiwe.
profile.keyDisclaimer: Ikhiye lakho langasese alikaze liphume kulesi sixhobo. Thumela ngaphandle ikhophi evikelwe ngephasiwedi ukuze ubuyisele kuyo kwenye idivayisi.
profile.themeFreeNotice: Use kusengaphambili—sebenzisa izinketho ezisheshayo zeLanga/Nyanga ngezansi. Khuphula ukuze uvule izindikimba eziningi.
profile.backupDesc: Gcina ikhiye lakho lokufihla ukuze ubuyisele imilayezo yakho ngokuphepha kwelinye idivayisi.
profile.freePlanCopy: Usehlelweni lwamahhala. Khuphula ukuze uvule izici ezengeziwe ezifana nezipele, izinombolo ezengeziwe, nezinketho zobumfihlo ezithuthukisiwe.
profile.portalOpenFailed: Akwenzeki ukuvula i-portal yokukhokhisa. Sicela uzame futhi.
profile.followHint: Izindaba zabo zizovela ku-feed yakho yokulandela uma zithunyelwe kubalandeli (noma Esidlangalaleni).
profile.sectionCrashedBody: Kukhona okuthile okungahambi kahle kulesi sigaba.
profile.callTextForwardingDescription: Dlulisa izingcingo nemilayezo engenayo kuhlelo lwakho lwefoni oluqinisekisiwe noma ku-imeyili yakho. Izicingo/imilayezo ephumayo ingakhombisa inombolo yakho ye-Chatforia.
profile.errSmsDest: Khetha okungenani indawo eyodwa (ifoni noma i-imeyili).
profile.errQuietHours: Amahora athule kumele abe phakathi kuka-0 no-23.
profile.ageBandHint: Sigcina kuphela ibanga lobudala (hhayi usuku lwakho lokuzalwa oluqondile) . Lokhu kusetshenziselwa ukugcina ukuphathwa kwamaqembu e-Random Chat kufanelekile.
profile.wantsAgeFilter: Sebenzisa ukufanisa okusekelwe eminyakeni ku-Random Chat
profile.wantsAgeFilterDesc: Uma kuvuliwe, sizama ukukufanisa nabantu abakumaqembu eminyakeni afanele.
profile.partnerAgeBandsDesc: Abasha bahlala behlanganyiswa kuphela nabanye abasha. Abantu abadala abakwazi ukuhlanganyiswa nabasha.
profile.teenMatchingNote: Ngenxa yokuphepha, ama-akhawunti aneminyaka engu-13 kuya kwengu-17 angahlanganyiswa kuphela namanye ama-akhawunti angu-13 kuya kwengu-17 ku-Random Chat.
profile.foriaRemember: Vumela uRia akhumbule izinto ozimtshela zona
profile.foriaRememberDesc: Uma lokhu kuvuliwe, uForia angasebenzisa izingxoxo zakho zangaphambilini ze-Random Chat (nguwe kuphela) ukuze ingxoxo iqhubeke. Ungakwazi ukuyivala noma yinini.
profile.voicemailAutoDeleteDays: Susa ngokuzenzakalelayo imilayezo yezwi ngemva kwezinsuku (days)
profile.voicemailGreetingText: Umbhalo wokubingelela uma umsindo wakho ungatholakali
profile.voicemailGreetingTextDesc: Kusetshenziswa uma umsindo wakho wokubingelela ungatholakali.
profile.voicemailNote: Imi-voicemail evela kumanombolo akho e-Chatforia izogcinwa ebhokisini lakho lokungenayo le-Voicemail. Ungavumela ukuguqulwa kombhalo nokudluliselwa ezinhlelweni ezisekelwayo.
profile.portHint: Ufuna ukugcina inombolo yakho yamanje? Ungayidlulisela ku-Chatforia Wireless.

izilungiseleloZokusebenziseka.flashOnCallDesc: Ukukhanya okukhanyayo okufushane lapho ucingo luyakhala.

why.title: Kungani abantu bethuthela ku-Chatforia
why.subtitle: I-Chatforia ikunikeza inombolo yocingo yangempela, ukuguqulela okuhlakaniphile, kanye nendlela ecacile yokuyeka izikhangiso uma usukulungele.

textnow.title: Chatforia vs TextNow
textnow.body: Izikhangiso ezilula ku-Mahhala, ukuthuthukisa okulula kwe-Plus uma usukulungele, namathuluzi e-Premium angawanikezwa yi-TextNow.

voice.title: Chatforia vs Google Voice
voice.body: Uhlelo lokusebenza lwesimanje, umklamo wamazwe omhlaba kuqala, nokuhumusha okwakhelwe ngaphakathi esikhundleni sokudlulisela izingcingo endala.

messengers.title: Chatforia vs izinhlelo zokuxoxa
messengers.body: Thumela imiyalezo ngenombolo yocingo yangempela — hhayi nje kubasebenzisi bezinye izinhlelo — nge-AI nesimo esakhelwe ngaphakathi. Kuhle uma uvela kwezinhlelo ezifana neTextFree noma iTextMe.

why.disclaimer: Ukuqhathanisa kusekelwe kulwazi olutholakala obala futhi kungashintsha ngokuhamba kwesikhathi. Ezinye izinhlelo zokusebenza zokuthumela imiyalezo yamahhala ezifana ne-TextFree noma i-TextMe ngokuvamile ziyafana ne-TextNow.

free.a: Yebo. Uhlelo lwamahhala luqukethe inombolo ye-Chatforia, ukushaya izingcingo, nokuthumela imiyalezo kunezikhangiso. Ungahlala ku-Free isikhathi eside njengoba uthanda, noma uthuthukise ukuze ususe izikhangiso futhi uvule izici eziningi.

plusPremium.a: I-Plus isusa izikhangiso futhi yandise umlando wemilayezo yakho — ifanele ukusetshenziswa kwansuku zonke. I-Premium ingeza ukwenza ngokwezifiso okwengeziwe, amathuluzi e-AI okubhala kabusha nokuphendula, kanye nokwesekwa okubalulekile kwabasebenzisi abasebenzisa kakhulu.

esim.a: I-Chatforia Mobile isebenzisa ukumbozwa kwe-eSIM emhlabeni wonke. Ukutholakala kuncike ezweni lakho nasemkhiqizweni wakho. Uzobona izinketho ezisekelwayo ngesikhathi sokuvula ngaphakathi kohlelo lokusebenza.

cancel.q: Ngingakhansela noma ngishintshe izinhlelo noma kunini?
cancel.a: Yebo. Ungaphatha noma ukhansele ukubhalisa kwakho kusuka ekhasini lokukhokha kuhlelo lokusebenza. Izinguquko ziqala ukusebenza ekupheleni kwesikhathi sakho samanje sokukhokha.

family.a: Amaphakheji omndeni adala ichibi ledatha elabelwe ama-akhawunti amaningi e-Chatforia. Umuntu oyedwa ukhokha ibhili , futhi ungamenyisa noma ukhiphe amalungu futhi usethe imikhawulo kumuntu ngamunye.

account.a: Landa uhlelo lokusebenza noma usebenzise iwebhu, thinta "Dala i-akhawunti", qinisekisa i-imeyili/inombolo yakho yocingo. Ukuze ubuyise, sebenzisa "Ngikhohliwe iphasiwedi".

privacy.a: Yebo. Imilayezo nezingcingo zifihlwe ngokuphelele (end-to-end) ngokungagcini. Ungu wedwa nomamukeli ongakwazi ukuzifunda.

translate.a: Vumela "Auto-translate" ku-Settings → Appearance & Language. Sihumusha kudivayisi lapho sekuxhaswa khona, kungenjalo sisebenzisa ama-API avikelekile ane-metadata encane.

contact.a: Sithinte ku-support@chatforia.com. Faka izithombe-skrini kanye nohlelo lwakho lokusebenza inguqulo.

indlelaEsebenzaNgayo.intshisekelo: I-Chatforia yakhelwe ukwenza ukuxhumana kube lula, kusheshe, futhi kufinyeleleke kalula. Ukuqala kuthatha izinyathelo ezimbalwa nje.
indlelaEsebenzaNgayo.step1Desc: Bhalisa usebenzisa i-imeyili yakho noma igama lomsebenzisi ukudala i-akhawunti yakho ye-Chatforia.
indlelaEsebenzaNgayo.step2Desc: Xhumana nabanye ngokukhetha abaxhumana nabo noma ukuqala izingxoxo ezintsha.
indlelaEsebenzaNgayo.step3Desc: Imilayezo iletwa ngokushesha ukuze inikeze isipiliyoni sokuxhumana esibushelelezi.
indlelaEsebenzaNgayo.step4Desc: Uhunyusho olwakhelwe ngaphakathi lusiza abasebenzisi ukuxhumana ngezilimi ezahlukene.
indlelaEsebenzaNgayo.step5Desc: Lawula izintandokazi zakho, abaxhumana nabo, nezilungiselelo zokuxhumana.

safety.title: Ukuvikeleka & Izinkomba Zomphakathi
safety.intro: I-Chatforia izibophezele ekugcineni indawo ephephile nenhlonipho kubo bonke abasebenzisi. Lezi zinkomba zisiza ukuqinisekisa isipiliyoni esihle kubo bonke.
safety.respectDesc: Kulindeleke ukuthi abasebenzisi baxhumane ngokuhlonipha. Ukuhlukunyezwa, ukuxhashazwa, noma ukuziphatha okubucayi akukuvunyelwe.

prohibited.intiyo: Inkulumo yentiyo noma ukuhlukumeza ngenxa yobuhlanga

izithuluzi.vimba: Vimba abasebenzisi ukuze uvimbele ukuxhumana okwengeziwe

safety.ukuphoqelelwaIncazelo: Singase sithathe izinyathelo maqondana nama-akhawunti aphula lezi ziqondiso, okuhlanganisa izixwayiso, imikhawulo, noma ukususwa unomphela epulatifomu.

whyMessaging.title: Kungani Amapulatifomu Okuthumela Imiyalezo Ebaluleke Kakhulu Kunjalo
whyMessaging.intro: Amapulatifomu okuthumela imiyalezo sekuyizinsiza ezibaluleke kakhulu zokuxhumana emhlabeni wanamuhla. Kusukela ezingxoxweni zomuntu siqu kuya ebudlelwaneni bebhizinisi, izinhlelo zokusebenza zokuthumela imiyalezo zivumela abantu ukuthi bahlale bexhumene ngokushesha nangempumelelo.
whyMessaging.everydayDesc: Abantu bathembele kumasu lokuthumela imilayezo ukuze baxhumane nsuku zonke nabangane, umndeni, nabalingani emsebenzini. Noma ngabe kuwukubuyekeza okusheshayo noma ingxoxo ende, ukuthumela imilayezo kunikeza indlela elula neguquguqukayo yokuhlala uxhumene.
whyMessaging.speedDesc: Enye yezinzuzo ezinkulu zamaqonga okuthumela imiyalezo ijubane lawo. Imiyalezo iletwa ngokushesha, ivumela abasebenzisi ukuba baxhumane ngesikhathi sangempela. Leli zinga lokunethezeka lenze ukuthumela imiyalezo kube yindlela yokuxhumana ekhethwa kakhulu abantu abaningi.
whyMessaging.globalDesc: Amapulatifomu okuthumela imilayezo axhumanisa abantu emhlabeni wonke. Ngenxa yokufinyelela ku-inthanethi, abasebenzisi bangakwazi ukuxhumana kungakhathaliseki indawo abakhona, okwenza kube lula ukwakha ubudlelwano nokusebenzisana emazweni ngamazwe.
whyMessaging.privacyDesc: Amapulatifomu okuthumela imiyalezo zanamuhla agxile ekunikezeni abasebenzisi ukulawula idatha yabo nezingxoxo zabo. Izici ezifana nokufihla imininingwane (encryption), izilungiselelo zobumfihlo, nezilawuli zemiyalezo zivumela abasebenzisi ukuba baxhumane ngokuzethemba.
whyMessaging.futureDesc: Ukuthumela imiyalezo kuyaqhubeka nokuthuthuka ngezici ezintsha ezifana nezimpendulo ezisekelwe ku-AI, ukuhumusha, nokwabelana ngokuqukethwe okuhlukahlukene (multimedia). Njengoba ubuchwepheshe buqhubeka nokuthuthuka, amapulatifomu okuthumela imiyalezo azoba namandla kakhulu futhi abe nokuguquguquka okwengeziwe.
whyMessaging.outro: I-Chatforia yakhiwe ngale migaqo engqondweni, inikeza isipiliyoni sokuthumela imilayezo esheshayo, esiphephile, nesilula kumsebenzisi emhlabeni oxhumene.

global.title: Ikusasa Lokuxhumana Komhlaba Wonke
global.intro: Ukuxhumana sekushintshe ngokushesha emashumini eminyaka adlule. Lokho okwakudinga izingcingo noma imihlangano ubuso nobuso manje kungenziwa ngokushesha ngezinkundla zokuthumela imilayezo. Njengoba ubuchwepheshe buqhubeka nokuthuthuka, ukuxhumana emhlabeni wonke kuya ngokushesha, kuyatholakala kalula, futhi kubandakanya wonke umuntu.
global.barriersDesc: Enye yezinguquko ezinkulu ekuxhumaneni ukuncipha kwezithiyo zendawo. Abantu manje bangaxhumana nabanye emhlabeni wonke cishe ngesikhathi sangempela. Noma ngabe izingxoxo zomuntu siqu, ibhizinisi, noma ukubambisana, amapulatifomu wokuthumela imilayezo enze ukuthi ibanga lingabi yisithiyo esikhulu.
global.translationDesc: Ulimi ngokwesiko kube ngomunye wemigoqo emikhulu ekuxhumaneni komhlaba wonke. Namuhla, amathuluzi okuhumusha akhelwe ngaphakathi asiza ukuvala leli banga. Amapulatifomu afana ne-Chatforia avumela abasebenzisi ukuba baxhumane kalula noma ngabe bakhuluma izilimi ezahlukene, edala amathuba amasha okuxhumana nokuqonda.
global.realtimeDesc: Ijubane liyisici esibalulekile esibumba ukuxhumana kwanamuhla. Abasebenzisi balindele ukuthi imilayezo ithunyelwe ngokushesha, futhi ingqalasizinda yanamuhla kusekela lokho okulindelekile. Ukuthumela imilayezo ngesikhathi sangempela kuvumela izingxoxo zemvelo neziguquguqukayo.
global.privacyDesc: Njengoba ukuxhumana kuba kwe-digital kakhulu, ubumfihlo nokuphepha kuba kubaluleke kakhulu. Abasebenzisi bafuna ukuba nokuzethemba ukuthi izingxoxo zabo zivikelwe. Izici ezifana nokufihla imininingwane (encryption) nezilungiselelo ezilawulwa ngumsebenzisi zisiza ukusekela isipiliyoni sokuxhumana esiphephile kakhulu.
global.futureDesc: Ikusasa lokuxhumana lomhlaba wonke kungenzeka libe namathuluzi athuthukile, njengokuthumela imilayezo ngosizo lwe-AI, ukuguqulela okuthuthukisiwe, kanye nezipiliyoni zabasebenzisi ezithuthukisiwe. Njengoba ubuchwepheshe buqhubeka bukhula, ukuxhumana kuzoqhubeka kuba nokuqonda kalula futhi kufinyeleleke kalula.
global.outro: Amapulatifomu afana neChatforia ayingxenye yalolu shintsho, asiza abantu baxhumane kalula ngokwezilimi nangemiphetho.

index.title: IBhulogi yeChatforia
index.intro: Hlola ukuqonda ngokuxhumana, ukuphepha ku-inthanethi, nokuthi ubuchwepheshe bokuthumela imilayezo buxhumanisa kanjani abantu emhlabeni wonke.

chatSafely.title: Indlela Yokuxoxa Ngokuphepha Ku-inthanethi
chatSafely.intro: Ukuxhumana ku-inthanethi sekwenze kwaba lula kunanini ukuhlangana nabantu emhlabeni wonke. Noma ngabe uthumela imiyalezo kubangane, uhlangana nabantu abasha, noma usebenzisana nabanye ngokomsebenzi, amapulatifomu okuthumela imiyalezo adlala indima ebalulekile ekuphileni kwansuku zonke. Nokho, ukuhlala uphephile ku-inthanethi kubalulekile njengokuhlala uxhumekile.

personalInfo.title: Vikela Ulwazi Lwakho Lomuntu Siqu
personalInfo.body: Omunye wemithetho ebaluleke kakhulu yokuphepha ku-inthanethi wukugwema ukwabelana ngolwazi lomuntu siqu olubucayi. Lokhu kuhlanganisa ikheli lakho lasekhaya, imininingwane yezimali, amaphasiwedi, noma yiluphi ulwazi olungakuchaza olungase lusetshenziswe kabi. Ngisho nasezingxoxweni ezijwayelekile, kungcono ukuqaphela ukuthi yini oyabelana ngayo nokuthi wabelana nobani ngakho.

safetyFeatures.title: Sebenzisa Izici Zokuphepha Ezakhelwe Ngaphakathi
safetyFeatures.body: Amapulatifomu wanamuhla okuthumela imiyalezo afana neChatforia anikeza amathuluzi okusiza abasebenzisi bahlale bephephile. Izici ezifana nokuvimba, ukubika, nezilawuli zobumfihlo zakhelwe ukunikeza abasebenzisi ukulawula okuhlangenwe nakho kwabo. Uma umuntu ezenza ngendlela engafanele noma ekwenza uzizwe ungakhululekile, kufanele usebenzise lawa mathuluzi ngokushesha.

ukukhwabanisa.title: Qaphela Ukukhwabanisa
ukukhwabanisa.body: Abakhohlisi bavame ukusebenzisa amapulatifomu okuthumela imiyalezo ukuze bakhohlise abasebenzisi ukuthi babelane ngolwazi lwabo siqu noma bathumele imali. Qaphela imiyalezo ebukeka imnandi kakhulu ukuze kube yiqiniso, njengeminikelo engalindelekile, izicelo eziphuthumayo, noma izixhumanisi ongazaziyo. Hlala uqinisekisa ubunikazi bomuntu okhuluma naye ngaphambi kokuthatha noma yiziphi izinyathelo.

ngokuziphatha okufanele.title: Xhumana Ngokuziphatha Okufanele ly
ngokuziphatha okufanele.body: Ukuxhumana ngenhlonipho kusiza ukudala indawo ephephile kubo bonke. Gwema ukubamba iqhaza ezingxoxweni eziyingozi noma ezihlukumezayo, futhi uqaphele ukuthi amazwi akho angase athinte abanye kanjani. Ukuxhumana okuhle kunikela ekuhlangenwe nakho okungcono kubo bonke abasebenzisi.

whySafety.title: Kungani Ukuvikeleka Ku-inthanethi Kubalulekile
whySafety.body: Njengoba ukuxhumana kwedijithali kuqhubeka kukhula, ukugcina ukuphepha nokwethenjwa kuba kubaluleke kakhulu. Ngokulandela izindlela eziyisisekelo zokuphepha nokusebenzisa amathuluzi atholakalayo, abasebenzisi bangajabulela izinzuzo zokuthumela imilayezo ngenkathi banciphisa ubungozi.

chatSafely.conclusion: Ukuhlala uphephile ku-inthanethi akudingi ulwazi lobuchwepheshe oluyingqayizivele—kudinga nje ukuqaphela, ukucophelela, nokwahlulela okuhle. Ngezindlela ezifanele, ungakwazi ukuxhumana ngokuzethemba futhi ngokuphephile.

about.title: Mayelana ne-Chatforia
about.description: I-Chatforia iyinhlelo yokuthumela imiyalezo ephephile, esekelwe ezilimini eziningi, enokufihlwa kwedatha kusukela ekuqaleni kuya ekugcineni (E2E), ukuhumusha ngokushesha, kanye nokubiza ngomsindo/ividiyo. Injongo yethu ilula: ukusiza abantu baxhumane—ngokuphepha, ngasese, nangaphezu kwezilimi.

values.privacy: Ukuqinisekisa ubumfihlo kuqala: Ukuvalwa kwedatha kusukela ekuqaleni kuya ekugcineni (E2E) ngokujwayelekile.

about.howDescription:
Imilayezo ibethwa kudivayisi yakho ngaphambi kokuba iphume kuyo.
Ukuguqulela, ukugcinwa kwedatha, nokuvumelanisa amadivayisi kuhlelwe ukunciphisa lokho amaseva ethu angakubona.
about.privacyDesc: Ukubethela kusukela ekuqaleni kuya ekugcineni nezilawuli zobumfihlo zakhelwe ngaphakathi ku-Chatforia kusukela ekuqaleni.
about.accessDesc: I-Chatforia isiza abantu baxhumane ngaphezu kwezilimi, amadivayisi, nemingcele.
about.controlDesc: Khetha ukuthi imilayezo ibukeka kanjani, nini lapho inyamalala khona, nokuthi i-akhawunti yakho ihlala ivikelekile kanjani.

press.title: Press
press.boilerplateBody: I-Chatforia uhlelo lokuthumela imilayezo oluqala ngobumfihlo olwenza ingxoxo phakathi kwezilimi zibe lula. Imilayezo ivikelwe kusukela ekuqaleni iye ekugcineni futhi i-app inesixhaso sokuhumusha esakhelwe ngaphakathi esisekela izilimi ezingaphezu kuka-100 ngesikhathi sangempela. Abasebenzisi bangavumela imilayezo inyamalale, bagcine ukuthola ubufakazi bokufunda kuyinketho, futhi bahlanganise imilayezo kumadivayisi ahlukene. Iyatholakala ku-iOS, Android, naku-webhu.
press.controlDesc: Khetha ukuthi imilayezo ibukeka -kuvalwa ngokuphelele kusukela ekuqaleni ngokwezinto ezijwayelekile, futhi ukuguqulwa okwakhelwe ngaphakathi kusekela izilimi ezingaphezu kuka-100 ngesikhathi sangempela. Abasebenzisi bangavumela imilayezo ukuthi inyamalale, bagcine izithole zokufunda ziyinketho, futhi bavumelanise kuzo zonke izisetshenziswa. Iyatholakala ku-iOS, Android, nakuwebhu.
press.scanTip: Kwi-desktop? Skena ngocingo lwakho ukuze uthole uhlelo lokusebenza.

careers.title: Imisebenzi
careers.intro: Siyithimba elincane elisungulayo elakha i-Chatforia — umlayezo wangasese womhlaba wonke oqala kuwebhu, ku-iOS, naku-Android. Uma ukhathalela ubumfihlo, ukufihlwa kwemininingwane, kanye nezipiliyoni zabasebenzisi ezimnandi, singathanda ukuzwa kuwe.
careers.openRoles: Izindima zokungena ekusunguleni: Umholi we-Full-stack Engineer, i-Backend Engineer (Node.js), Umkhandi we-Frontend/Web (React), Umkhandi we-Mobile (iOS), Umkhandi we-Mobile (Android), Umkhandi we-DevOps/SRE, Umkhandi Wezokuphepha Nokufihla Idatha, Umkhandi Wezokuxhumana (Twilio + eSIM).
careers.apply: Ungafaka kanjani isicelo: Sebenzisa inkinobho engezansi ukuthumela i-imeyili eneresume yakho nezixhumanisi.
careers.whyBullets:
• Siza ukwakha isisekelo somlayezo womhlaba wonke omusha.
• Thumela izithuthukisi ezisetshenziswa kuwebhu, ku-iOS, naku-Android.
• Sebenza ngqo nomseki ekwakhiweni nasekuqondiseni umkhiqizo.
• Bamba izindawo ezinethonya elikhulu ku-stack: imilayezo, izwi, ividiyo, ukufihla imininingwane, ezokuxhumana, i-AI. n• Joyina ekuqaleni — ngaphambi kokuba isisekelo sabasebenzisi sikhule.

advertise.title: Khangisa ne-Chatforia
advertise.description: Finyelela kubasebenzisi abathumela imilayezo abazibophezele ngokubeka okunomoya, okuphephile kumkhiqizo. Sinikeza isitoreji sebhanela ezindaweni ezibonakala kakhulu, izixhaso, futhi izipesheli zangaphakathi. Ababhalisile be-Premium ababoni izikhangiso.

adsense.withPubIdShort: Siphinde sinikeze isitoko nge-Google AdSense. Ungaqondisa i-Chatforia nge-ID yomshicileli {{pubId}}, noma usebenzise ifomu elingezansi ukuthola izixhaso ngqo.
adsense.noPubIdShort: Siphinde sinikeze ezinye izitoko nge-Google AdSense. Izixhaso ngqo ziyatholakala—sebenzisa ifomu elingezansi.

advertise.noPlacementsPublic: Sisondela ekupheleni kwesitoko sethu sezikhangiso. Sitshele ngomkhankaso wakho futhi sizoncoma izindawo zokubeka.

why.highSession: Inani eliphezulu lezikhathi zokuxoxa nesikhathi eside sokuhlala ku-UI yokuxoxa
why.brandSafe: Izinhlobo eziphephile kubhrendi; ukulinganiselwa kwesibalo sezikhathi ngokuhlonipha
why.sponsoredMoments: Izikhathi ezixhaswayo (isb., i-modal ethi "Qala Ingxoxo") etholakala
why.izivumelwano: Izivumelwano eziqondile noma ezihlelwayo nge-AdSense/Google Ads

contact.title: Xhumana Nathi
contact.errorSend: Akwenzekanga ukuthumela. Sicela uthumele i-imeyili ku-support@chatforia.com.

intro.umzimba: Le Nqubomgomo Yobumfihlo ichaza ukuthi i-Chatforia ("thina", "kithi") iqoqa kanjani, isebenzisa kanjani, futhi yabelana kanjani ngolwazi lapho usebenzisa izinhlelo zethu zokusebenza nezinsizakalo zethu. Sakha i-Chatforia ukuze sinciphise idatha esingayifinyelela.

Ulwazi Esiluqoqayo.i-akhawunti: Ulwazi lwe-akhawunti (isb., i-imeyili/ifoni) ukuze kwakhiwe futhi kuvikelwe i-akhawunti yakho.
Ulwazi Esiluqoqayo.encrypted: Okuqukethwe okuvikelwe (imiyalezo/izingcingo) kuvikelwe kusukela ekuqaleni kuya ekugcineni; asikwazi ukukufunda.
Ulwazi Esiluqoqayo.diagnostics: Ukuxilongwa/ukusetshenziswa njengemibhalo yokwehluleka, uhlobo lwedivayisi, noma ukuhlaziywa okujwayelekile ukuze kuthuthukiswe ukusebenza.

sms.title: Amanombolo weselula ne-SMS
sms.body:
Uma ukhetha ukuhlinzeka inombolo yocingo ephathekayo, siyisebenzisa ukuvumela izici ezifana nokuqinisekisa i-akhawunti, izaziso zokungena, nokuthumela imilayezo kusuka kumsebenzisi kuya kumsebenzisi nge-SMS lapho sekuxhaswa khona. Singathumela imilayezo ye-SMS yokuthengiselana ehlobene ne-akhawunti yakho nemisebenzi yakho ku-Chatforia. Ungakhetha ukungatholi imilayezo ye-SMS nganoma yisiphi isikhathi ngokuphendula ngokugama elisekelwayo lokuphuma (njenge-"STOP") noma ngokushintsha izintandokazi zakho zezaziso kuhlelo lokusebenza. Asikwazi
thengisa inombolo yakho yocingo noma ukuyisebenzisa ekumaketheni okungahlangene.

howWeUse.hlinzeka: Hlinzeka futhi uvikeleke ngesevisi (ukuqinisekisa ubunikazi, ukutholwa kwe-spam/ukusetshenziswa kabi).

ukwabelana.umzimba: Asidayisi idatha yomuntu siqu. Singabelana ngedatha ethile nabacubunguli (isb., izaziso zokuphushwa, ukuhlaziywa) ngaphansi kwezinkontileka eziqinile.

amalungelo.umzimba: Kuncike esifundeni sakho (isb., GDPR/UK GDPR/CPRA), ungacela ukufinyelela, ukulungisa, ukucinywa, noma ukukhetha ukungabambi iqhaza ekucubungulweni okuthile. Xhumana: privacy@chatforia.com.

ukugcinwa.umzimba: Sigcina kuphela lokho okudingekayo ukuze sisebenze insiza futhi sisebenzise izindinganiso zokuphepha zemboni. Okuqukethwe kwe-E2E akukwazi ukuvulwa kithi.

children.title: Izingane
children.body: I-Chatforia ayihloselwe izingane ezingaphansi kweminyaka engu-13 (noma njengoba kudingeka ngumthetho wendawo yakho).

izinguquko.umzimba: Sizothumela izibuyekezo lapha futhi sibuyekeze usuku oluthi "Okubuyekezwe ngokugcina".

uxhumano.umzimba: privacy@chatforia.com • Chatforia LLC, 123 Example St, Sheridan, WY 82801, USA

intro.body: Ngokusebenzisa i-Chatforia uyavuma le Mithetho. Uma ungavumelani, ungayisebenzisi insiza.

ama-akhawunti.title: Ama-akhawunti
ama-akhawunti.itemAccurateInfo: Hlinzeka ngolwazi oluqondile futhi ugcine imininingwane yokungena iphephile.

okusetshenziswaOkwamukelekayo.itemNoAbuse: Akukho okuqukethwe okungekho emthethweni, okudlulele, noma okuphulayo; akukho spam noma ukusetshenziswa ngokuzenzakalelayo.

refund.title: Inqubomgomo Yokubuyiselwa Imali
refund.intro: E-Chatforia, sizama ukuhlinzeka ngezinsizakalo ezisezingeni eliphezulu kubo bonke abasebenzisi. Le Nqubomgomo Yokubuyiselwa Imali ichaza ukuthi imali ingabuyiselwa nini.

subscriptions.title: Ukubhalisa
subscriptions.body: Ukubhalisela kuyakhokhiswa kusengaphambili njalo ngesikhathi esiphindaphindiwe. Ungakhansela noma kunini ngokusebenzisa izilungiselelo ze-akhawunti yakho noma ipulatifomu esetshenziselwe ukuthenga.

ukufaneleka.umzimba: Ukubuyiselwa kwemali kunganikezwa ngenxa yokukhokhiswa kabili, amaphutha okukhokhisa, noma izinkinga zobuchwepheshe ezivimbela ukufinyelela ezici ezikhokhelwayo. Zonke izicelo zibhekwa ngamunye ngamunye.

okungabuyiselwa.body: Ngokuvamile asinikezi imali ebuyayo ngesikhathi esingasetshenziswanga, izikhathi zokubhalisa ezingaphelele, noma ukwehluleka ukukhansela ngaphambi kokuvuselelwa.

thirdParty.title: Ukuthenga Kwesithathu
thirdParty.body: Uma kuthengwe ngokusebenzisa isithathu -party platforms such as the Apple App Store, refunds must be requested directly through those platforms.

contact.title: Xhumana Nathi
contact.body: support@chatforia.com • Chatforia LLC, 30 N Gould Street STE N, Sheridan, WY 82801, USA

doNotSell.title: Ungathengisi noma Wabelane Ngolwazi Lwami Lwangasese
doNotSell.body: I-Chatforia ayithengisi ulwazi lwangasese. Abahlali baseCalifornia bangasathumela izicelo ngaphansi kwe-CPRA besebenzisa inkinobho engezansi.

cookies.title: Izilungiselelo zama-Cookie
cookies.body: I-Chatforia isebenzisa ama-cookie amancane kakhulu (isb., seshini, ukuphepha). Asisebenzisi amakhukhi ezikhangiso zomuntu wesithathu. Lawula amakhukhi ngezilungiselelo zebrawuza yakho.

whatWeSend.title: Okuthunyelwayo kwethu
whatWeSend.body: I-Chatforia ithumela kuphela ama-SMS ahlobene ne-akhawunti nawokuxoxa kumasimu wocingo umsebenzisi awanikeze ngokusobala futhi avume kuwo. Imilayezo evamile ifaka amakhodi okungena/okuqinisekisa, izaziso zokulethwa kwemilayezo, izaziso zokuphepha, nezibuyekezo ze-akhawunti zokuthengiselana.

optIn.title: Indlela abasebenzisi abavuma ngayo
optIn.body: Abasebenzisi bavuma ngokufaka inombolo yabo yocingo ngesikhathi sokubhalisa futhi bahlola i- ibhokisi lokuvuma i-SMS ekhasini lokubhalisa noma elizinikele

optOut.title: Indlela abasebenzisi abaphuma ngayo
optOut.stop: Phendula STOP kunoma iyiphi i-SMS ye-Chatforia ukuze uphume.

help.title: Usizo
help.bodyPrefix: Phendula HELP ukuze uthole usizo noma i-imeyili

privacyTerms.title: Ubumfihlo Nezimo
privacyTerms.bodyStart: Ngokuvuma i-SMS, abasebenzisi bavuma futhi izimo zethu
